title: Play the Ball as It Lies
text: In general, the player must play the ball as it lies on the course and play the course as the player finds it, unless a rule allows relief.

title: Out of Bounds and Lost Ball
text: A ball is out of bounds when all of it lies outside the boundary edge. If a ball is lost or out of bounds, the player normally proceeds under stroke-and-distance.

title: Penalty Areas
text: When a ball is in a penalty area, the player may play it as it lies or take penalty relief options for one penalty stroke under the applicable rule.

title: Unplayable Ball
text: Except when in a penalty area, a player may declare a ball unplayable anywhere on the course and proceed with relief options for one penalty stroke.

title: Putting Green Ball Mark and Lift
text: On the putting green, a player may mark and lift the ball to clean it, then replace it on its original spot before play continues.
